results.title: Stock Market Today, April 30: Caterpillar's Jump After Earnings Helped Fuel Surge in Dow
Mag 7 Momentum: Stocks Up on Earnings, Data, Oil
Stock Market Today: Dow, S&P Live Updates for April 30 - Bloomberg
Stock Market Today (Apr. 29, 2026): Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta to report after bell

summary: S&P 500 +1.02% to 7,209 (all-time high), Nasdaq +0.89%, Dow +1.62%. Caterpillar +10% on earnings beat, Eli Lilly +7%; Meta -9% on AI capex hike. Oil elevated on US blockade of Iranian ports.
